name: Olive Garden Eggplant Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
1. Moisten eggplant and coat lightly with flour.
2. Quickly brown slices in hot oil, dusting each side generously with seasoned salt.
3. When fork-tender and golden brown, transfer to a jelly roll pan. Cover loosely with foil and bake at 375°F for about 20-25 minutes or until tender. Use 8 slices of eggplant for this amount of sauce.
4. In a saucepan, combine the Prego sauce, grape jelly, and broken-up tomatoes. Heat on medium until piping hot, ensuring the jelly is melted.
5. Arrange 2 slices of eggplant on each of 4 plates. Cover each with 1 slice of mozzarella. Ladle the sauce over all, not to cover completely. Place the plates back in the oven at 375°F just to melt the cheese and serve promptly.
